MNEMONIST-AGE_BEFORE_BEAUTY_POWER.descri: At the start of your turn, if you have 20 or more cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], gain 3 [blue]Strength[/blue] and [blue]Dexterity[/blue] until the end of the turn.
MNEMONIST-AGE_BEFORE_BEAUTY_POWER.smartD: At the start of your turn, if you have 20 or more cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], gain {Amount} [blue]Strength[/blue] and [blue]Dexterity[/blue] until the end of the turn.
MNEMONIST-AGE_BEFORE_BEAUTY_POWER.title: Age Before Beauty
MNEMONIST-COGNITIVE_IGNITION_POWER.descr: Whenever an [blue]Engram[/blue] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
MNEMONIST-COGNITIVE_IGNITION_POWER.smart: Whenever an [blue]Engram[/blue] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {Amount} damage to a random enemy.
MNEMONIST-COGNITIVE_IGNITION_POWER.title: Cognitive Ignition
MNEMONIST-FORGOTTEN_FRUSTRATION_POWER.de: When you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a non-[gold]Status[/gold] card during your turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for the turn.
MNEMONIST-FORGOTTEN_FRUSTRATION_POWER.sm: When you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a non-[gold]Status[/gold] card during your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] for the turn.
MNEMONIST-HELPFUL_MNEMONICS_POWER.title: Helpful Mnemonics
MNEMONIST-IMAGINARY_FUEL_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, spend 2 [blue]Memory[/blue] to gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
MNEMONIST-IMAGINARY_FUEL_POWER.smartDesc: At the end of your turn, spend 2 [blue]Memory[/blue] to gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn, up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:time|times}.
MNEMONIST-IMAGINARY_FUEL_POWER.title: Imaginary Fuel
MNEMONIST-MEMORIZATION_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, shuffle an [blue]Engram[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and draw a card.
MNEMONIST-MEMORIZATION_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, shuffle {Amount} [blue]{Amount:plural:Engram|Engrams}[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
MNEMONIST-MEMORIZATION_POWER.title: Memorization
MNEMONIST-MEMORY.description: Before your enemies act, add [blue]X[/blue] [blue]Engrams[/blue] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MEMORY.smartDescription: Before your enemies act, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]{Amount:plural:Engram|Engrams}[/blue] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MEMORY.title: Memory
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_FORM_POWER.descriptio: At the end of your turn, deal damage equal to your [blue]Memory[/blue] to ALL enemies. [blue]Memory Engrams[/blue] are shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_FORM_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of your turn, deal damage equal to {Amount} times your [blue]Memory[/blue] to ALL enemies. [blue]Memory Engrams[/blue] are shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_FORM_POWER.title: Mnemonic Form
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_WALL.description: If you would take [red]damage[/red], instead [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that many cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] first.
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_WALL.smartDescription: If you would take [red]damage[/red], instead [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that many cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] first.
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_WALL.title: Mnemonic Wall
MNEMONIST-RECURSIVE_MEMORY_POWER.title: Recursive Memory
MNEMONIST-SIMPLE_MNEMONICS_POWER.descrip: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-SIMPLE_MNEMONICS_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-SIMPLE_MNEMONICS_POWER.title: Simple Mnemonics
MNEMONIST-TRAIN_OF_THOUGHT_POWER.descrip: This turn, when you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a non-[gold]Status[/gold], draw a card.
MNEMONIST-TRAIN_OF_THOUGHT_POWER.smartDe: This turn, when you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a non-[gold]Status[/gold], draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
MNEMONIST-TRAIN_OF_THOUGHT_POWER.title: Train Of Thought
